commit.subject: LU-16796 lnet: Change struct lnet_delay_rule to use kref
commit.message:
LU-16796 lnet: Change struct lnet_delay_rule to use kref

This patch changes struct lnet_delay_rule to use
kref instead of atomic_t

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ie2a4173ba569b37b58d9c61f41a5f7a7bc11cedc
